title: Property Consultant - Brookfield India REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Brookfield India REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
